description_long: This object is a rectangular, compact electronic device with a predominantly gray and black color scheme, accented by red circular buttons and a red logo. The top surface features a classic layout with a black directional pad on the left, two red action buttons on the right, and two rectangular gray buttons labeled 'SELECT' and 'START' in the center. The branding 'Nintendo' is clearly visible in red on the upper right section. The device has a layered construction, with a visible seam running along the side, suggesting a two-part plastic shell. The overall design is flat and ergonomic, optimized for handheld use, with all interactive elements on the top face. The object is reminiscent of vintage consumer electronics, specifically a game controller, and is likely constructed from hard plastic with internal electronic components.
description: A rectangular, vintage-style electronic controller with a gray and black body, red buttons, and a visible Nintendo logo. The top face features a directional pad, two action buttons, and two rectangular control buttons.
description_view_0: The object is viewed from the bottom edge, showing the flat profile and the tops of the buttons and controls.
description_view_1: The front face is fully visible, displaying the directional pad, 'SELECT' and 'START' buttons, and two red action buttons, along with the Nintendo logo.
description_view_2: The right edge is shown, highlighting the two red action buttons and the Nintendo logo, with the rest of the controls partially visible.
description_view_3: The back edge is visible, showing the tops of the buttons and a small port or connector on the side.
